name: Saw // BFDI
description:
Uhh. Hello! Yes, me again. Look, I made a bot! Aren't you proud? :D

Requested?

Yes/no

So, I don't have much to say. Basically, you can create your own scenario, or just use the scenario I provided. I will do request bots weekly. I'd do anything for fans! (I worked so hard on this)

//>_<🍓//>_<🍓\\^_^🍒\\^_^🍒 ♥︎°____________________________°♪ //>_<🍓//>_<🍓\\^_^\\^_^🍒

Basically, first scenario, she's trying to impress you and cheer you up, but you didn't feel like chatting because you weren't in a good mood! (You choose the reason, I'm bad at scenarios.) And 2nd scenario is where you can make your own scenario. Sorry if the bot isn't as canon as I thought it would be, haven't watched BFDI, BFB, like... About Ang object shows in a while, been going through some things. Nothing else >0<
creator: KittyEatzTidepodz
